letter:
Hey Temi!! 🎉

Okay so I made you this whole experience because... you deserve it?? No special occasion needed! You're just that one. The friend who shows up. The one who laughs at everything (including me). The one who makes everything more fun simply by being in it.

So here it is. A whole vibe, made just for you. Because you're absolutely that girl and we love to see it.

Now go enjoy this. You deserve all of it. 💫
customClosingMessage: You made someone smile today, Mimi. That someone is us 🙌
